what: luxR — Light exposure and photic regularity analysis for R
title: luxR — Light exposure and photic regularity analysis for R
text: R package photic exposure light-timing/regularity metrics circadian chronobiology research.

title: luxR — Light exposure and photic regularity analysis for R
text: luxR processes ambient light exposure data collected wrist-worn actigraphy devices — Axivity AX3/AX6 ActTrust — context circadian chronobiology research. provides pipeline photic exposure metrics (much light, bright) light timing/regularity metrics (light happens, consistent timing day day), designed sit alongside actigraphy- sleep-derived circadian metrics wider Circadia Lab ecosystem.

title: luxR — Light exposure and photic regularity analysis for R
text: 📊 Exposure metrics — mean/median illuminance, time threshold (TAT), cumulative photic history, melanopic EDI approximation ⏰ Timing & regularity metrics — light onset/offset detection, mean light timing, Light Regularity Index (LRI) analogous sleep regularity indices 📈 Visualisation — actogram-style plotting visual QC light exposure patterns 🔌 Device-agnostic — built accept light channel data Axivity (via axR/zeitR::read_axivity()) ActTrust alike

title: luxR — Light exposure and photic regularity analysis for R
text: luxR active early development. data structures (light_trace(), validate_light_trace()) implemented; metric visualisation functions scaffolded full documentation currently raise "yet implemented" underlying algorithms built validated. See NEWS.md ’s landed far.

title: luxR — Light exposure and photic regularity analysis for R
code: luxR/ ├── R/ │   ├── constructors.R          # light_trace(), validate_light_trace() │   ├── exposure-metrics.R      # compute_mean_light, compute_tat, compute_photic_history, compute_melanopic_edi │   ├── regularity-metrics.R    # compute_lri, compute_light_midpoint │   ├── onset-offset.R          # find_light_onset, find_light_offset │   ├── plot-actogram.R         # plot_light_actogram │   └── luxR-package.R ├── man/                        # roxygen-generated documentation + hex logo ├── tests/testthat/             # unit tests ├── dev/                        # real-data smoke tests (not part of the formal suite) ├── inst/COPYRIGHTS             # per-function provenance/validation notes └── _pkgdown.yml

title: luxR — Light exposure and photic regularity analysis for R
luxR — Light exposure and photic regularity analysis for R
text: luxR isn’t published yet. Install development version GitHub: published, available Circadia Lab r-universe:

title: luxR — Light exposure and photic regularity analysis for R
code: library(luxR)  trace <- light_trace(time = your_timestamps, lux = your_lux_values, device = "axivity") print(trace)

title: luxR — Light exposure and photic regularity analysis for R
text: ⏱️ zeitR — wrist actigraphy, sleep staging, circadian metrics 📡 axR — Axivity AX3/AX6 import device control 😴 hypnoR — hypnogram analysis sleep architecture 🍬 sugaR — continuous glucose monitoring analysis 🔗 syncR — unified participant database 🔬 circadia-bio — Circadia Lab GitHub organisation

title: luxR — Light exposure and photic regularity analysis for R
text: Released MIT License. Copyright © Lucas França & Mario Leocadio-Miguel, 2026

title: Compute mean light timing (MLiT) — compute_light_midpoint
text: Calculates light-exposure-weighted circular mean clock time illuminance threshold, analogous mean sleep timing metrics.

title: Compute mean light timing (MLiT) — compute_light_midpoint
Compute mean light timing (MLiT) — compute_light_midpoint
text: trace object class luxR_trace (see light_trace()). threshold Numeric scalar, illuminance threshold lux exposure counts toward timing calculation. Default 1000.

title: Compute mean light timing (MLiT) — compute_light_midpoint
text: numeric scalar, clock time decimal hours (0-24).

what: Compute the Light Regularity Index (LRI) — compute_lri
title: Compute the Light Regularity Index (LRI) — compute_lri
text: Calculates day--day regularity index light exposure, analogous Sleep Regularity Index (cf. zeitR::compute_sri()): probability participant light-exposure state (/threshold) clock time consecutive days, averaged across comparable epochs.

title: Compute the Light Regularity Index (LRI) — compute_lri
Compute the Light Regularity Index (LRI) — compute_lri
text: traces list luxR_trace objects single participant, one per day, sharing common epoch length. threshold Numeric scalar, illuminance threshold lux separating "light" "dark" states. Default 1000. epoch_minutes Numeric scalar, epoch length minutes comparison across days. Default 1.

title: Compute the Light Regularity Index (LRI) — compute_lri
text: numeric scalar -100 100, units zeitR::compute_sri().

what: Compute mean or median light exposure — compute_mean_light
title: Compute mean or median light exposure — compute_mean_light
text: Calculates central-tendency summary illuminance luxR_trace, optionally restricted time window (e.g., single day wake-period subset).

title: Compute mean or median light exposure — compute_mean_light
Compute mean or median light exposure — compute_mean_light
text: trace object class luxR_trace (see light_trace()). window Optional length-2 POSIXct vector giving c(start, end) restrict calculation . Default NULL (use whole trace). stat Character scalar, one "mean" (default) "median".

title: Compute mean or median light exposure — compute_mean_light
text: numeric scalar (lux).

what: Approximate melanopic equivalent daylight illuminance (melanopic EDI) — compute_melanopic_edi
title: Approximate melanopic equivalent daylight illuminance (melanopic EDI) — compute_melanopic_edi
text: Converts photopic illuminance (lux) approximate melanopic EDI value using fixed calibration factor. Actigraphy devices' broadband light sensors measure spectral composition directly, approximation treated substitute spectroradiometric measurement.

title: Approximate melanopic equivalent daylight illuminance (melanopic EDI) — compute_melanopic_edi
Approximate melanopic equivalent daylight illuminance (melanopic EDI) — compute_melanopic_edi
text: trace object class luxR_trace (see light_trace()). calibration_factor Numeric scalar, photopic-lux--melanopic-EDI conversion factor. Default NULL, case device-specific default looked trace$device (yet implemented).

title: Approximate melanopic equivalent daylight illuminance (melanopic EDI) — compute_melanopic_edi
text: numeric vector, length trace$lux, giving approximate melanopic EDI values.

title: Compute cumulative photic history — compute_photic_history
text: Calculates exponentially-weighted cumulative light exposure history timepoint trace, use input circadian phase-response models recent light exposure carries weight distant exposure.

title: Compute cumulative photic history — compute_photic_history
Compute cumulative photic history — compute_photic_history
text: trace object class luxR_trace (see light_trace()). tau Numeric scalar, decay time constant hours. Default 1.

title: Compute cumulative photic history — compute_photic_history
text: numeric vector, length trace$lux, giving cumulative photic history timepoint.

what: Compute Time Above Threshold (TAT) for light exposure — compute_tat
title: Compute Time Above Threshold (TAT) for light exposure — compute_tat
text: Calculates total duration illuminance exceeds given threshold, expressed minutes.

title: Compute Time Above Threshold (TAT) for light exposure — compute_tat
Compute Time Above Threshold (TAT) for light exposure — compute_tat
text: trace object class luxR_trace (see light_trace()). threshold Numeric scalar, illuminance threshold lux. Default 1000, common cutoff outdoor/bright light exposure. window Optional length-2 POSIXct vector giving c(start, end) restrict calculation . Default NULL (use whole trace).

title: Compute Time Above Threshold (TAT) for light exposure — compute_tat
text: numeric scalar, minutes threshold.

title: Find daily light offset — find_light_offset
text: Locates last sustained crossing light threshold within day, mirroring find_light_onset().

title: Find daily light offset — find_light_offset
Find daily light offset — find_light_offset
text: trace object class luxR_trace (see light_trace()), typically spanning single day. threshold Numeric scalar, illuminance threshold lux. Default 1000. min_duration_minutes Numeric scalar, minimum sustained duration threshold required, minutes. Default 5.

title: Find daily light offset — find_light_offset
text: POSIXct scalar giving offset time, NA qualifying offset found.

title: Find daily light onset — find_light_onset
text: Locates first sustained crossing light threshold within day, requiring threshold exceeded minimum duration avoid triggering brief artefactual spikes.

title: Find daily light onset — find_light_onset
Find daily light onset — find_light_onset
text: trace object class luxR_trace (see light_trace()), typically spanning single day. threshold Numeric scalar, illuminance threshold lux. Default 1000. min_duration_minutes Numeric scalar, minimum sustained duration threshold required, minutes. Default 5.

title: Find daily light onset — find_light_onset
text: POSIXct scalar giving onset time, NA qualifying onset found.

what: Construct a light exposure trace object — light_trace
title: Construct a light exposure trace object — light_trace
text: Low-level constructor single continuous ambient light exposure trace, recovered wrist-worn actigraphy device's light channel (Axivity via axR/zeitR::read_axivity(), ActTrust).

title: Construct a light exposure trace object — light_trace
Construct a light exposure trace object — light_trace
text: time POSIXct vector timestamps. lux Numeric vector illuminance values (lux), length time. device Character scalar identifying source device type. One "axivity", "acttrust", "generic" (default), last light data tied specific device's calibration.

title: Construct a light exposure trace object — light_trace
text: object class luxR_trace.

what: luxR: Light Exposure and Photic Regularity Analysis for Chronobiology Research — luxR-package
title: luxR: Light Exposure and Photic Regularity Analysis for Chronobiology Research — luxR-package
text: Tools processing ambient light exposure data collected wrist-worn actigraphy devices (Axivity AX3/AX6 ActTrust) context circadian chronobiology research: photic exposure metrics (mean/median illuminance, time threshold, cumulative photic history, melanopic EDI approximation) light timing/regularity metrics (light onset/offset detection, mean light timing, Light Regularity Index).

title: luxR: Light Exposure and Photic Regularity Analysis for Chronobiology Research — luxR-package
text: Maintainer: Lucas França lucas.franca@northumbria.ac.uk (ORCID) Authors: Lucas França lucas.franca@northumbria.ac.uk (ORCID) Mario Leocadio-Miguel (ORCID)

what: Plot a light exposure actogram — plot_light_actogram
title: Plot a light exposure actogram — plot_light_actogram
text: Produces double-plotted actogram-style figure ambient light exposure across consecutive days, visual inspection/QC light onset/offset detection overall photic exposure pattern.

title: Plot a light exposure actogram — plot_light_actogram
Plot a light exposure actogram — plot_light_actogram
text: traces list luxR_trace objects plot, typically spanning consecutive days one participant.

title: Plot a light exposure actogram — plot_light_actogram
text: ggplot object.

what: Validate a light exposure trace — validate_light_trace
title: Validate a light exposure trace — validate_light_trace
text: Performs basic quality-control checks luxR_trace object: strictly increasing timestamps, non-negative illuminance values, minimum proportion non-missing data.

title: Validate a light exposure trace — validate_light_trace
Validate a light exposure trace — validate_light_trace
text: trace object class luxR_trace (see light_trace()). max_na_prop Numeric [0, 1], maximum tolerated proportion NA illuminance values trace flagged invalid. Default 0.1.

title: Validate a light exposure trace — validate_light_trace
text: list elements valid (logical) issues (character vector describing problems found; empty valid TRUE).

title: luxR 0.0.0.9000 (2026-07)
text: Initial package skeleton: DESCRIPTION, roxygen skeletons planned pipeline functions, testthat stubs. exported functionality implemented yet – pipeline functions currently raise “yet implemented” tracked open work. Planned functions: compute_mean_light(), compute_tat(), compute_photic_history(), compute_melanopic_edi(), compute_lri(), compute_light_midpoint(), find_light_onset(), find_light_offset(), plot_light_actogram(). light_trace() S3 constructor validate_light_trace() stub implemented.
